dsl_rule.translation_notes: Diamond Top/Bottom pattern detection: Entry triggered on breakout (close crossing Donchian channel boundaries). Donchian Upper/Lower represent pattern boundaries. Direction determined by breakout direction (long on upper breakout, short on lower breakout). Exit on pullback to midline (Donchian middle). Stop loss set at 5% conservative margin given 69% success rate on bear breakouts and 17% average decline. No specific exit authored so reversal condition used.

backtest_rule.reason: Diamond Top/Bottom pattern detection: Entry triggered on breakout (close crossing Donchian channel boundaries). Donchian Upper/Lower represent pattern boundaries. Direction determined by breakout direction (long on upper breakout, short on lower breakout). Exit on pullback to midline (Donchian middle). Stop loss set at 5% conservative margin given 69% success rate on bear breakouts and 17% average decline. No specific exit authored so reversal condition used.

source_rule_text: Diamond Top/Bottom: Wait for breakout before entry. Diamond top shows quick rise followed by decline back to launch point. Diamond bottom shows steep drop followed by rise back to launch point.
